arts.ttl: Josuha Guilavogui gives shoutout to Leeds United hero v Coventry as stunning footage emerges
arts.sum: That was largely down to Leeds’ inability to make totally sure of the result but converting their many second half chances, but the Sky Blues looked to claw their way back into the game when Ellis Simms turned a header towards the bottom corner, only to be thwarted by an incredible outstretched arm from Illan Meslier: Watch: Illan Meslier produces two brilliant saves to keep Leeds clean sheet v Coventry

arts.ttl: Leeds United announce shock signing as goalkeeper seals transfer
arts.sum: Leeds United have announced the signing of Australia under-20 goalkeeper Robbie Cook from native club Perth Glory on a two-and-a-half year professional deal. A statement from Leeds United read: “Leeds United are pleased to announce the signing of goalkeeper Robbie Cook, who joins the club from Australian outfit Perth Glory.

arts.ttl: Leeds vs Millwall Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Championship leaders Leeds will be hoping to seal their place in the next round of the FA Cup when they welcome Millwall to Elland Road on Saturday afternoon. Ahead of the match, we’ve made ...

arts.ttl: Leeds United confirm Robbie Cook signing
arts.sum: Leeds United have confirmed the signing of young goalkeeper Robbie Cook on a permanent deal from Perth Glory. It was reported back in January that Leeds had handed a trial to 18-year-old Australian goalkeeper Robbie Cook, coming over from Perth Glory to Thorp Arch.

arts.ttl: Leeds United notebook - Joel Piroe’s Illan Meslier admission and 'special' Guilavogui message - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Illan Meslier has continued to receive plaudits as replays of his saves against Coventry City are shared around social media and chat forums. Meslier did not have to make any game-saving stops in that match as the attackers took the limelight.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's Joel Piroe in great company with Liverpool's Mohamed Salah as transfer point made
arts.sum: Joel Piroe scored his third goal in two matches for Leeds United during their 2-0 win over Coventry City on Wednesday. It was a trademark finish from Piroe, who is Leeds' top scorer this season with 13 goals in 31 Championship games.

arts.ttl: Only 1 Leeds United player: David Prutton names divisive Championship TOTS so far
arts.sum: Leeds United are top of the league by five points coming into this weekend, but it isn’t enough for David Prutton to name multiple players in his Championship Team of the Season so far. David Prutton names Championship Team of the Season so far – only one Leeds player included

arts.ttl: Leeds sign U21 Man City winger Brooklyn Nfonkeu on loan
arts.sum: Report: Leeds complete youth loan signing of Manchester City talent Brooklyn Nfonkeu Leeds United have completed the loan transfer of Manchester City youngster Brooklyn Nfonkeu for the remainder of the season, linking up with the U21s.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss Alex Neil sends Leeds United ‘respect’ message with FA Cup warning
arts.sum: Millwall manager Alex Neil says Elland Road might well be the toughest Championship ground to play at this season - but has warned Leeds United that his squad tends to do better when the odds are stacked against them. The Lions, Saturday's FA Cup opponents, subjected United to one of their three league defeats earlier in the season when Japhet Tanganga’s goal was enough to separate the two sides in November.

arts.ttl: Leeds United seal transfer reunion with 17-y/o Manchester City winger on youth loan
arts.sum: Report: Leeds complete youth loan signing of Manchester City talent Brooklyn Nfonkeu Leeds United have completed the loan transfer of Manchester City youngster Brooklyn Nfonkeu for the remainder of the season, linking up with the U21s.
